plugins.name: quant-econometrics
plugins.description: A growing jar of econometrics & time-series skills for quant trading research. Each skill turns a piece of the classic literature (Engle/Bollerslev GARCH, Dickey-Fuller, KPSS, Box-Jenkins, Engle-Granger) into a runnable, walk-forward, zero-lookahead tool — validated on real market data.
